The '''Chalenor system''' was located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], and contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Amador]] and its [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Mayvitch 7]].

==Appearances==
*[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 1|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars (1998) 40|''Star Wars'' (1998) 40]] {{Flash}}
